task_description: Adopt UI/UX patterns from reactbits.dev to refresh components, layout, and visuals; add tasteful effects/backgrounds; modernize interactions while keeping business logic intact.

stack.ui: Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI primitives, custom shadcn-like components

decisions: Prefer decorative overlays (aurora/grid/spotlight) that do not alter layout or data flow.
Enhance perceived quality with glass surfaces and subtle motion; respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Avoid invasive refactors of business components initially; layer styles and wrappers first.

details: Added AuroraBackground and GridBackground effects components.
Wired both effects globally in app layout as non-interactive overlays.
Applied glass-surface styling to sticky Header for subtle blur.
Enhanced homepage hero with gradient text and entrance animation.
Animated item cards with subtle fade/slide and hover lift.
Added aurora keyframes and glass helper in globals.css.
Added Spotlight effect that gently highlights cursor area.
Wired spotlight into layout with low intensity.
Respects reduced motion by keeping it event-driven only.
Added Button variant 'beam' with gradient border and shimmer.
Introduced Magnetic wrapper for subtle pointer-follow hover.
Applied 'beam' + Magnetic to sign-in CTA in Header.
Refreshed Footer background with subtle grid overlay.

actions_taken.summary: Rolled beam CTA to booking flows
details: Applied Magnetic + beam variant to ItemCard primary CTA.
Applied beam variant to BookingFormView continue button.
Rebuilt Footer component to correct address text and keep overlay.

next_steps: Audit admin/rental lists for remaining key actions to beam/btn-beam.
Fine-tune Footer spacing and Input/Button sizes for mobile.
Add shimmer/magnetic hover for prominent buttons.
Optional: Add subtle parallax for hero media if available.
Audit components for consistent radius/spacing and apply tokens.
